description_long: This shopping mall features a sprawling, L-shaped layout with a combination of flat, dark brown roofs and lighter beige sections. The roof surfaces are adorned with a pattern of rectangular skylights and panels, suggesting a modern architectural approach. Large glass windows and open facades are visible along the sides, providing ample natural light and visibility into the interior spaces. The exterior walls are a mix of wood, glass, and concrete, with some areas displaying vibrant signage and illuminated features. The mall appears to have multiple levels, with the main entrance likely located at the intersection of the two wings. The overall design emphasizes accessibility, openness, and a contemporary urban aesthetic.
description: A modern, L-shaped shopping mall with flat, patterned roofs, large glass windows, and a mix of wood and concrete exterior. The structure features open facades and vibrant signage, reflecting a contemporary urban style.
description_view_0: This view highlights the L-shaped layout, with the main entrance area and a mix of dark and light roof sections visible.
description_view_1: From this angle, the long expanse of the dark brown roof and the extended wing of the mall are prominent, with visible glass facades below.
description_view_2: This perspective emphasizes the intersection of the two wings, showing the patterned roof and the lighter beige section more clearly.
description_view_3: The view showcases the opposite side of the mall, with the lighter roof section and additional glass windows, as well as some visible signage.
attribute_storefront_signage: Visible illuminated signage with bold text and graphics, placed above entrances and along the facade, likely made of acrylic or metal with backlighting.
